summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ObaidTradez news sentiment integration, 1000+ stock universe expansion, and watchlist bug fix. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working.

issues: Nested button warning: watchlist button is inside card button element - causes HTML validation warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: /api/trading/scan returns news_sentiment, news_impact, news_headlines fields
Backend: News sentiment values are valid (Bullish, Bearish, Slightly Positive, Slightly Negative, Neutral)
Backend: News impact values are in range (-10 to +10)
Backend: News headlines have correct structure (title, sentiment, score)
Backend: /api/news/AAPL returns news items with sentiment scores
Backend: /api/news/{symbol} works for multiple symbols (MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA)
Backend: Sentiment scores are between 0 and 1
Backend: Watchlist loads correctly
Backend: Watchlist items have required fields (symbol, name, price, signal, category)
Backend: Add stock to watchlist works (GME, META)
Backend: Remove stock from watchlist works
Backend: Watchlist items persist
Backend: /api/investments/scan returns all categories
Backend: /api/investments/browse returns 305 stocks
Backend: Trading scan provides dashboard data
Backend: High-volatility day trading stocks (GME, AMC, TQQQ, SQQQ, MARA, RIOT) are analyzable
Frontend: Dashboard loads with Top Trading Signals and Investment Ideas
Frontend: Trading page shows Top Trades Today with news sentiment badges
Frontend: News sentiment badge displays 'News: Slightly Positive (+4)' on XOM
Frontend: Recent News headlines appear under trading signals
Frontend: Signal Quality Diagnostics panel shows stocks scanned, signals generated, excluded reasons
Frontend: Watchlist page loads with 5 stocks
Frontend: Watchlist items persist after 5 seconds (bug fix verified)
Frontend: Add stock to watchlist works via UI (META added successfully)
Frontend: Investment page loads with 305 stocks analyzed
Frontend: Investment categories populated (Hot:15, Bullish:15, Undervalued:15, Watch:15, Bearish:16)
Frontend: Live prices indicator shows on all pages
critical_code_review_comments: NewsSentimentEngine correctly aggregates news from FMP and Finnhub APIs
Sentiment scoring uses rule-based analysis with positive/negative word lists
News impact (-10 to +10) adjusts trading signal confidence by +/- 5%
Trading signals include news_sentiment, news_impact, and news_headlines fields
CORE_UNIVERSE expanded to ~1400 symbols including high-volatility day trading stocks (GME, AMC, TQQQ, SQQQ, etc.)
Watchlist bug fix verified - items persist beyond 3 seconds
seed_data_creation: Existing watchlist items: TSLA, NVDA, MSFT, AAPL, GOOGL
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) News sentiment integration - trading signals show news_sentiment (Bullish/Bearish/Slightly Positive/Negative), news_impact (-10 to +10), and news_headlines. XOM shows 'News: Slightly Positive (+4)' with recent headlines. 2) /api/news/{symbol} returns news items with sentiment scores. 3) Watchlist bug fix verified - items persist beyond 3 seconds. 4) High-volatility day trading stocks (GME, AMC, TQQQ, SQQQ, MARA, RIOT) are in universe and analyzable. 5) Dashboard shows Top Trading Signals and Investment Ideas. 6) Investment page shows 305 stocks with proper categorization.

news_api.returns: List of NewsItem with title, sentiment, sentiment_score, source

ui_display.news_badge: Shows 'News: Slightly Positive (+4)' on trading cards

dashboard.top_trading_signals: Shows XOM, CVX with Strong Buy

known_issues.nested_button_warning: HTML validation warning for nested button in Trading.jsx - doesn't affect functionality
